commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3e062906dc23bc72853e45df8e5220542c982fa9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds global and per-channel channel-health restart-mode config and a graceful health-monitor recovery branch that skips the explicit restart-attempt reset.

PR surface: Source +115. Total +115 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: no. not fully. Current main source shows the health-monitor stopChannel(manual:false) -> resetRestartAttempts -> startChannel path, but there is no live stale-socket or Anthropic prompt-cache spike proof attached.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer handling is needed because the blockers are product acceptance, contributor real behavior proof, and rebase/repair across current gateway runtime seams rather than a narrow automated patch.

target.title: feat(gateway): add channelHealthRestartMode to preserve Anthropic prompt cache on stale-socket
target.author: serhiizghama

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
